---
title: "Competencies in head and neck surgery teaching for specialty residents. Position statement of Brazilian Head and Neck Surgery Society"
date: 2026-01-01
author:
  - name: Dedivitis, Rogério Aparecido
  - name: Castro, Mario Augusto Ferrari De
  - name: Matos, Fátima Cristina Mendes De
  - name: Nakai, Marianne Yumi
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo De
  - name: Kulcsar, Marco Aurélio Vamondes
  - name: Chone, Carlos Takahiro
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
  - name: Dias, Fernando Luiz
  - name: Martins, André Cruz
  - name: Silva, Bruna Carteiro
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Otorhinolaryngology"
  volume: 92
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1016/j.bjorl.2025.101710"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Competencies in head and neck surgery teaching for specialty residents. Position statement of Brazilian Head and Neck Surgery Society</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
